since_last: 69% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.51%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC +0.45% · Gold +0.51% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 69% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.51%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.51%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: PUBM is the standout at +8.05%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.62% at $126.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
